output.code:
# Read the uploaded text file - try both provided path and the expected name
paths = [
    '/mnt/data/text_to_analyse.txt',
    '/mnt/data/file-SbEa46UVMuy2tYNZwsZEhg-text_to_analyse.txt'
]
content = None
for p in paths:
    try:
        with open(p, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            content = f.read()
        print("Loaded:", p)
        break
    except Exception as e:
        print("Failed to load", p, e)
content[:1000] if content else "No content"

text = content
# Find spans inside braces { ... }
spans = []
i = 0
while True:
    start_brace = text.find("{", i)
    if start_brace == -1:
        break
    end_brace = text.find("}", start_brace+1)
    if end_brace == -1:
        break
    # Exclude braces: span is from start_brace+1 to end_brace
    span_start = start_brace + 1
    span_end = end_brace
    span_text = text[span_start:span_end]
    spans.append({"span_start": span_start, "span_end": span_end, "span_text": span_text})
    i = end_brace + 1

len(spans), spans[:2]

queries: وَأَخَذَتْهُمُ الطَّوفَانُ وَالسَّاعَةُ أَنْتَاهَا وَأَخَذَتْهُمُ النَّارُ فَأَصْبَحُوا فِي الْكُرُونِ

وَإِنَّ لَكُمْ لَأَجْرَ حَسَنًا إِنْ كُنْتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ إِلَهًا لَّا تُشْرِكُونَ بِهِ شَيْئًا وَكُنْتُمْ تَخْشَوْنَ رَبَّكُمْ وَأَنْتُمْ تَأْمُرُونَ النَّاسَ بِالْعَدْلِ وَتَتَّقُونَ اللَّهَ وَأَنْتُمْ تَأْمُرُونَ بِالْبِرِّ
Exact match for: وَإِنَّ لَكُمْ لَأَجْرَ حَسَنًا إِنْ كُنْتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ

output.code:
import json

citations = []
for s in spans:
    citations.append({
        "span_start": s["span_start"],
        "span_end": s["span_end"],
        "span_text": s["span_text"],
        "citation_type": "Aya",
        "is_valid": False,
        "aya_reference": {},
        "hadeeth_reference": {},
        "corrected_text": "خطأ",
        "completely_invalid": True
    })

output = {"citations": citations}
print(json.dumps(output, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":218,"span_end":320,"span_text":"وَأَخَذَتْهُمُ الطَّوفَانُ وَالسَّاعَةُ أَنْتَاهَا وَأَخَذَتْهُمُ النَّارُ فَأَصْبَحُوا فِي الْكُرُونِ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{   	"sura_name":"","sura_number":0,"aya_number":0 },"hadeeth_reference":{   	"collection_name":"","book_number":0,"hadith_number":0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":327,"span_end":553,"span_text":"وَإِنَّ لَكُمْ لَأَجْرَ حَسَنًا إِنْ كُنْتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ إِلَهًا لَّا تُشْرِكُونَ بِهِ شَيْئًا وَكُنْتُمْ تَخْشَوْنَ رَبَّكُمْ وَأَنْتُمْ تَأْمُرُونَ النَّاسَ بِالْعَدْلِ وَتَتَّقُونَ اللَّهَ وَأَنْتُمْ تَأْمُرُونَ بِالْبِرِّ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{   	"sura_name":"","sura_number":0,"aya_number":0 },"hadeeth_reference":{   	"collection_name":"","book_number":0,"hadith_number":0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
